rationale: Enterprise Security and Attack Surface Management (ASM) platforms require a trustworthy, authoritative, precise 'control room' feel. We chose a high-contrast dark theme with sharp, technical geometry to reduce eye strain for SOC analysts monitoring threats for extended periods.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High density for data tables, generous padding for structural containers. 'Control Room' grid layout.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6. Direct children only.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards, p-4 for dense list items.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-800 on all structural elements. Grid borders exposed.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces. No shadow or extreme minimal shadow. bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md.

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-400 border-b border-zinc-800
tables.cells: Whitespace nowrap, use JetBrains Mono for IPs, IDs, and numeric data.

badges_tags.style: px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-1.5

buttons.primary: bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/50
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 border border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

charts.style: Remove cartesian grid lines or make them very faint (stroke='#27272A'). Use solid colors for lines/bars (blue-500, emerald-500, amber-500). Tooltip bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle background shifts and border color changes. Fast transitions (duration-150 ease-out).
interactions_and_motion.loading: Skeleton loaders using animate-pulse bg-zinc-800. For charts: centered spinner or shimmer effect.
interactions_and_motion.empty_states: Centered flex container, muted icon (lucide-react), text-zinc-400, clear call-to-action button.
interactions_and_motion.error_states: Subtle red border on component, warning icon, user-friendly error text with retry button.

testing.attributes: MUST include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, rows). Kebab-case, role-based.

images.description: Abstract dark building geometric pattern for login/registration split screen background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: react-router-dom, @tanstack/react-query, recharts, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Set up JWT authentication flow with ProtectedRoutes.
Implement the Dashboard with Recharts and summary cards.
Implement Asset Inventory with robust filtering, search, and pagination functionality.
Ensure the entire app uses the Dark Theme colors defined here.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
